examples: I have a live-in nanny for my youngest daughter.
Brad and Angelina have one nanny for each of their six children.
She took her young daughter Sasha to the University of Chicago hospital for an interview because she couldn't find a nanny.
Trimmer discovered most nanny services opened at 9 a.m. and closed at 5 p.m.
Sausmarez Manor is thought to be full of ghosts, notably the Nanny of the 28 Children.
